prompt:
Professional brand guidelines poster infographic, single page, vertical layout, dark background (#0A0A0C). Clean, modern, premium corporate design document. Replicate this EXACT layout zone by zone:

TOP HEADER ZONE (top 12% of canvas):
Left side: Large bold text 'BRAND' in white and 'GUIDELINES' below it in grey (#707070), both in a bold blocky geometric sans-serif font like Microgramma Extended Bold. Right side: The logo 'MM AGENCY.' in white bold blocky uppercase geometric sans-serif, with a yellow (#FAFA00) dot at the end. Subtle dark blue/yellow radial gradient glow in top-right corner behind the logo, very subtle.

MIDDLE SECTION — TWO COLUMN GRID (from 14% to 88% height):
Thin dark border lines (#1A1A1E) separating all sections. Each section has a small yellow (#FAFA00) bullet dot followed by section title in uppercase bold small text.

LEFT COLUMN TOP — COMPANY LOGO (14% to 38%):
Yellow bullet + 'COMPANY LOGO' label. Below: dark rectangle (#181818) containing the wordmark 'MM AGENCY.' in large bold white blocky uppercase geometric sans-serif, yellow dot at end. Below the box: small yellow text 'CHAKRA PETCH BOLD · #FFFFFF' and grey text below describing the typeface specs.

RIGHT COLUMN TOP — LOGO VARIATIONS (14% to 38%):
Yellow bullet + 'LOGO VARIATIONS' label. Three small cards in a row: First card has dark background with 'MM AGENCY.' in white, labeled 'Dark Background'. Second card has light/white background with 'MM AGENCY.' in black with yellow dot, labeled 'Light Background'. Third card has dark background with 'MM AGENCY.' in yellow, labeled 'Yellow Accent'. Below: three more cards showing circular brandmark variations — circle with yellow ring containing 'MM' in white.

LEFT COLUMN MIDDLE — LOGO CLEARSPACE (38% to 58%):
Yellow bullet + 'LOGO CLEARSPACE' label. Dark box containing the wordmark 'MM AGENCY.' in white with yellow dashed border lines around it showing exclusion zone, with corner marks. Small annotation 'X' with arrow showing the clearspace measurement. Below: small grey text explaining the clearspace rule.

RIGHT COLUMN MIDDLE — BRAND PALETTE (38% to 58%):
Yellow bullet + 'BRAND PALETTE' label. Grid of 8 color swatches arranged in 2 columns x 4 rows. Each swatch is a filled circle with color name and hex code next to it. Colors: Yellow (#FAFA00), White (#FAFAFA), Violet (#713DFF), Orange (#F54900), Cyan (#00E3FF), Pink (#FCA8FF), Grey (#707070), Dark (#181818 with thin white border). Each with 'HEX' and 'RGB' values in small monospace text.

LEFT COLUMN BOTTOM — TYPOGRAPHY (58% to 86%):
Yellow bullet + 'TYPOGRAPHY' label. Three font specimens stacked vertically, separated by thin lines. Each shows: Large 'Ab' in the font on left side, font name and weight on right. First: 'Ab' in bold blocky geometric font, 'CHAKRA PETCH' / 'BOLD (700)' with alphabet below in uppercase and lowercase. Second: 'Ab' in clean sans-serif, 'DM SANS' / 'REGULAR (400)' with alphabet. Third: 'Ab' in monospace font, 'DM MONO' / 'REGULAR (400)' with numbers.

RIGHT COLUMN BOTTOM — ICONOGRAPHY + BUTTONS (58% to 86%):
Yellow bullet + 'ICONOGRAPHY STYLE' label. Grid of 8 icons (4x2) in dark rounded squares (#202020). Icons are thin white outlined stroke style: bar chart, target/bullseye, globe, smartphone, lightning bolt, group of people, email envelope, trending up arrow. Below the icons: Yellow bullet + 'BUTTON STYLE' label. Three buttons in a row: First is solid yellow (#FAFA00) button with black text 'GET STARTED', labeled 'Primary'. Second is outlined white border button with white text 'LEARN MORE', labeled 'Secondary'. Third is outlined grey border button with grey text 'CONTACT', labeled 'Ghost'.

BOTTOM FOOTER (bottom 4%):
Left: small grey text 'MM AGENCY. © 2026 · ALL RIGHTS RESERVED'. Right: very small faded grey wordmark logo.

OVERALL STYLE: Ultra clean, precise, professional brand document. NO photography, NO gradients except the subtle header glow. Flat design. All text is crisp and legible. The entire poster looks like a professional design agency's brand sheet. Dark mode. Thin 1px border lines separating sections. Consistent spacing. Vector quality.
negative_prompt: blurry text, illegible text, misspelled text, wrong text, photorealistic, photography, humans, faces, 3D rendering, busy background, colorful background, white background, light background, gradients, watermark, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge, messy layout, overlapping elements, crowded, cluttered, amateur design, clip art, cartoon style, hand drawn, sketch
